terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.section1Content: By accessing and using Ayvro, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.
terms.section2Content: Permission is granted to temporarily use Ayvro for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only.
terms.section3Content: The materials on Ayvro are provided on an 'as is' basis. Ayvro makes no warranties, expressed or implied.
terms.section4Content: In no event shall Ayvro or its suppliers be liable for any damages arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on Ayvro.
terms.section5Content: Ayvro may revise these terms of service at any time without notice. By using this app, you are agreeing to be bound by the current version of these terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Content: We collect information you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, and usage data.
privacy.section2Content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, and to communicate with you.
privacy.section3Content: We do not share your personal information with third parties except as described in this privacy policy.
privacy.section4Content: We take reasonable measures to help protect your personal information from loss, theft, misuse, and unauthorized access.
privacy.section5Content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information at any time through your account settings.
